# Backslash-escaped newlines in variable definitions
mk -n -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
# A multi-line variable is expanded to decide to run two sub-depenencies
deps = \
	one \
	 two

test3.mk.o: $deps
	secondprocess ab

one:
	process bar

two:
	process rebar
-- expected --
two: process rebar
one: process bar
test3.mk.o: secondprocess ab
